case_title: FRANKLIN, DARLENE C. vs. OCEAN VIEW, MERCED, INGLESIDE COMMUNITY ASSOCIATIO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, DARLENE C. AS TO DEFENDANT OCEAN VIEW, MERCED, INGLESIDE COMMUNITY ASSOCIATIO
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCEAN VIEW, MERCED, INGLESIDE COMMUNITY ASSOCIATIO $5,717.71 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,800.71
